what_it_does: Stores metadata for a channel memory attachment of type board_items that points to a board item target.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares attachment id att-964af819 in the dragnet-development channel.
attachment_type is board_items and target is board://item-bc5047d2.
standouts: The attachment target uses a board:// URI scheme.
There is no payload or descriptive text beyond the metadata fields.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter inside a markdown file.
Follows an id/channel/attachment_type/target/added schema for attachment records.
concerns: The file provides no context about what the attached board item represents.
notes: A bare channel-memory attachment ledger entry that links a board item target to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or meaning does board://item-bc5047d2 represent?
What behavior does attachment_type board_items imply?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment record matches the content; it records a target reference but carries no payload.
intention_signals: To register a board item attachment in the dragnet-development channel memory so it can be located by id or target reference.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped attachment record that maps a board item target to a channel memory entry.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record identifying a board_items attachment targeting board://item-bc5047d2 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a reference from a channel memory attachment to a specific board item.
